Bindings.Binding: if SlashCmdList and SlashCmdList["EBAUTOLOOT"] then SlashCmdList["EBAUTOLOOT"]("") end

Binding.name: AUTOLOOT_TOGGLE_ENABLED
Binding.description: Enable or disable the loot+sell cycle

Bindings.Binding: if SlashCmdList and SlashCmdList["EBAUTOLOOT"] then SlashCmdList["EBAUTOLOOT"]("toggle") end

Binding.name: AUTOLOOT_FORCE_SELL
Binding.description: Force a sell cycle right now

Bindings.Binding: if SlashCmdList and SlashCmdList["EBAUTOLOOT"] then SlashCmdList["EBAUTOLOOT"]("sell") end
